name: opencode
notes: opencode reads global agents from ~/.config/opencode/agents/ and per-project agents from .opencode/agents/. cognitive-os injects a governance subagent globally. Uses {file:path} syntax to reference OPERATOR.md if Hermes is installed. AGENTS.md serves as the per-project behavioral contract (same file as Codex). If config dir is absent but opencode binary exists, cognitive-os creates the directory.
